sections.title: Recurring Transaction
sections.description: Whether it's an installment you're paying off gradually or a repeat transaction that happens weekly, monthly, or yearly. Spenzy tracks them automatically so you'll never miss a thing.

sections.title: Upcoming Widget
sections.description: Keep an eye on what's coming! See your upcoming transactions based on your recurring setup right from the homepage.

sections.title: New currency support
sections.description: Added more currencies including: TWD, VND, LKR, RSD, KWD, SAR, UYU, AED, TND, KES, ARS, UAH, COP, GHS

sections.title: Export to CSV
sections.description: Back up your data or move it anywhere you like - perfect if you want to analyze or use it on another platform.

sections.title: Improvements
items: Managing categories is now easier - expense and income lists are neatly separated.
Got duplicated categories? No problem. Merge them in one tap to tidy up your list.
